lines.speaker: Siegfried Erkle
lines.text: Hello there and welcome to the shop of useful items. Can I help you at all?

lines.speaker: Siegfried Erkle
lines.text: Silverlight? No, Sir Prysin of Varrock explained that that was a unique sword and told us to stop selling it. If you want Silverlight, but don't have it, you should speak to him.

lines.speaker: Siegfried Erkle
lines.text: So would you like to see what else I have?

lines.speaker: Siegfried Erkle
lines.text: Okay. Well, if you change your mind, do pop back.
